---
title: "The Wand and the Hand"
date: "2026-05-19"
description: "A 20-slide AI literacy foundation, after Canon IX of the Bobble Canon. The wand has a power. Not the power. A power."
categories: [presentation, ai literacy, bobble, canon]
path: /assets/the-wand-and-the-hand.pdf
---

```{=html}
<p>Opening <a href="/assets/the-wand-and-the-hand.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">the slide deck (PDF)</a>…</p>
<script>window.location.replace("/assets/the-wand-and-the-hand.pdf");</script>
```
